description: Artifact (250KB) alone exceeds max_bundle_bytes (200000). Assembler MUST emit narrow_scope_required error — same error path as fixture (b), even though the failure condition is different (artifact > total cap vs. artifact > per-file cap).

expected_assembler_output.error_message: Artifact (250000 bytes) exceeds max_bundle_bytes (200000). Multi-model review cannot proceed at full fidelity. Narrow review scope (smaller diff, single file) and retry.
